title: Invest In The Best: 2 Dividend Growth Stocks To Hold Forever
text: In times of market turmoil, it makes sense to look at what works on the stock market. As proven by countless papers, the recipe for success is consistent dividend growth. Hence, in addition to discussing the theoretical background of dividend growth success, I present two fantastic wide-moat dividend growth stocks.

title: WM Sets Date for First Quarter Earnings Release Conference Call
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WM (NYSE: WM) announced that it will release first quarter financial results after the close of the market on Wednesday, April 26, 2023 and host its investor conference call Thursday, April 27 at 10 a.m. ET. Listeners can access a live audio webcast of the conference call by visiting investors.wm.com and selecting “Events & Presentations” from the website menu. A replay of the audio webcast will be available at the same location following the conclusion of the call. Participants who will be dialing in for the conference call should register to obtain their dial in and passcode details. Participants may pre-register at any time, including up to and after the call start time. The Company participates in investor presentations and conferences throughout the year. Interested parties can find a schedule of these conferences at investors.wm.com by selecting "Events & Presentations." ABOUT WM WM (WM.com) is North America's largest comprehensive waste management environmental solutions provider. Previously known as Waste Management and based in Houston, Texas, WM is driven by commitments to put people first and achieve success with integrity. The company, through its subsidiaries, provides collection, recycling and disposal services to millions of residential, commercial, industrial and municipal customers throughout the U.S. and Canada. With innovative infrastructure and capabilities in recycling, organics and renewable energy, WM provides environmental solutions to and collaborates with its customers in helping them achieve their sustainability goals. WM has the largest disposal network and collection fleet in North America, is the largest recycler of post-consumer materials and is the leader in beneficial reuse of landfill gas, with a growing network of renewable natural gas plants and the most gas-to-electricity plants in North America. WM's fleet includes nearly 11,000 natural gas trucks – the largest heavy-duty natural gas truck fleet of its kind in North America – where more than half are fueled by renewable natural gas. To learn more about WM and the company's sustainability progress and solutions, visit Sustainability.WM.com.

title: WM to Host Virtual Sustainability Investor Day
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WM (NYSE: WM) today announced that it will host a virtual sustainability investor day on Wednesday, April 5, 2023, with presentations given by Jim Fish, President and Chief Executive Officer; Devina Rankin, Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer; Tara Hemmer, Senior Vice President and Chief Sustainability Officer; and other members of management.

title: WM to Host Virtual Sustainability Investor Day
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WM (NYSE: WM) today announced that it will host a virtual sustainability investor day on Wednesday, April 5, 2023, with presentations given by Jim Fish, President and Chief Executive Officer; Devina Rankin, Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer; Tara Hemmer, Senior Vice President and Chief Sustainability Officer; and other members of management. Presentations will be focused on the Company’s investments and growth opportunities in its renewable energy and recycling businesses. Participants can register for and join the event by visiting http://investors.wm.com and selecting “Events & Presentations” from the website menu. Participants may pre-register at any time. The presentations, which will include question and answer sessions, will begin promptly at 10:00 a.m. EST and are expected to conclude by 12:00 p.m. A replay will be available on http://investors.wm.com under Events & Presentations. ABOUT WM WM (WM.com) is North America's largest comprehensive waste management environmental solutions provider. WM's fleet includes nearly 11,000 natural gas trucks – the largest heavy-duty natural gas truck fleet of its kind in North America – where more than half are fueled by renewable natural gas. To learn more about WM and the company's sustainability progress and solutions, visit Sustainability.WM.com.

title: Waste Management: Predictable And Growing Earnings, But One Caveat
text: Waste Management, Inc. is one of those companies to keep in a long-term portfolio when the stock valuation is favorable. Even in times of recession, waste collection and recycling are a basic need.

title: Waste Management: Like The Smell Of It, Except The Price
text: Waste Management, Inc. has simply focused on solid execution, that is, increasing prices, managing volumes, and pursuing bolt-on M&A. The company has smartly focused on recycling and environmental activities as well.
